mapper.insert: insert into sys_notice_read ( notice_id, user_id, read_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values ( #{noticeId}, #{userId}, #{readTime}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate() ) on duplicate key update read_time = values(read_time), update_by = values(update_by), update_time = values(update_time)
